signals.signal_title: Sasol CIO launches GenAI program — 10-30 use cases developed with zero initial investment
signals.signal_description: Group CIO Lungile Mginqi initiated a generative AI program in 2023 starting with a zero-cost phase using volunteer developers, resulting in 10-30 GenAI use cases developed internally. Microsoft Copilot deployed across enterprise. Phase 2 with investment commitment planned for 2024. CIO publicly presented at CIO Day South Africa 2023 on the AI governance and guardrails framework.

spend_model_flags.ai_maturity_notes: CIO Lungile Mginqi is externally active and driving GenAI agenda publicly. Microsoft Copilot confirmed deployment. GenAI program with 10-30 use cases in production. Score 13 — below ≥15 threshold.

enrichment_notes: Petrochemical & Specialty Chemicals company HQ Johannesburg South Africa. FY2024 revenue $13.9B, 27,411 employees. CIO Lungile Mginqi confirmed and active. channel_mismatch=false (cleared 2026-05-17). ms_standardized=false (cleared 2026-05-16). ai_maturity=13. WWT addressable $451.9M at 27%. NOTE: No active WWT account team assigned as of May 2026 — not covered by STOLA, MENA, or any other territory. Practical near-term opportunity is low until coverage is assigned. Do not prioritize for outreach without confirming account ownership first. US Lake Charles chemicals complex is the most logical WWT entry point if coverage is established.
